display.purpose: Comic book cover titles. Splash text on hero sections. Only place Bangers is used.

headline.purpose: Section titles, sidebar project names, modal headers.

title.purpose: Card titles, button text at large sizes, toast messages.

body.purpose: All running text. Paragraphs, descriptions, chat messages. Max 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Status indicators, metadata, timestamps, technical data. Mono only.

sketch.purpose: Decorative hand-lettered text. Tooltips, hints. Max once per screen.

shadows.name: brutal
shadows.purpose: Default card elevation. Single-plate offset shadow.

shadows.name: brutal-lg
shadows.purpose: Hover-state elevation. Shadow grows on lift.

shadows.name: comic
shadows.purpose: Two-plate CMYK shadow. Cyan + content layers. Identity card elevation.

shadows.name: comic-magenta
shadows.purpose: Magenta first plate. Emphasis and attention-demanding elements.

shadows.name: comic-pop
shadows.purpose: Hover state for comic elements. Expanded offset signals plate shift.

motion.name: ease-comic-pop
motion.purpose: Doodle-pop entrance animation (600ms). Overshoot for character.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button with Inkwell Gold fill and brutal shadow. Tactile press on active.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #E8B730; color: #1a1a1a; font-family: 'Fredoka', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; border: 3px solid oklch(0.28 0.01 280 / 0.3); border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 20px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px oklch(0.28 0.01 280 / 0.3); transition: transform 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translate(-0.5px, -0.5px); box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px 0px oklch(0.28 0.01 280 / 0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translate(1px, 1px); box-shadow: none; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px oklch(0.28 0.01 280 / 0.3); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Minimal button with no fill. Shadow and background appear on hover only.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #2C2C3A; font-family: 'Fredoka', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; border: 3px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 20px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: none; transition: background 200ms, box-shadow 200ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #F0EFE6; box-shadow: 2px 2px 0px 0px oklch(0.28 0.01 280 / 0.3); }

components.name: Doodle Card
components.description: Standard content card with brutal shadow. Lift on hover.
components.css: .ds-card-doodle { background: #FAFAF5; border: 3px solid oklch(0.28 0.01 280 / 0.3); border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px oklch(0.28 0.01 280 / 0.3); transition: transform 200ms, box-shadow 200ms; } .ds-card-doodle:hover { transform: translate(-0.5px, -0.5px); box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px 0px oklch(0.28 0.01 280 / 0.3); }

components.name: Comic Card
components.description: Identity card with CMYK cyan shadow. Featured content and canvas sections.
components.css: .ds-card-comic { background: #FAFAF5; border: 3px solid oklch(0.28 0.01 280 / 0.4); border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 3px 3px 0px 0px #00bcd4, 5px 5px 0px 0px oklch(0.28 0.01 280 / 0.25); transition: transform 200ms, box-shadow 200ms; } .ds-card-comic:hover { transform: translate(-0.5px, -0.5px); box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #00bcd4, 7px 7px 0px 0px oklch(0.28 0.01 280 / 0.3); }

components.name: Doodle Input
components.description: Text input with 3px border. Focus shifts border to Inkwell Gold.
components.css: .ds-input-label { display: block; font-family: 'Fredoka', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 4px; font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-input-doodle { width: 100%; background: #FAFAF5; border: 3px solid oklch(0.28 0.01 280 / 0.3); border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 200ms; } .ds-input-doodle:focus { border-color: #E8B730; }

components.name: Speech Bubble (AI)
components.description: AI message bubble with left-pointing triangle. Comic convention for incoming speech.
components.css: .ds-speech-ai { position: relative; background: oklch(0.91 0.008 85 / 0.5); border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: 'Bangers', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-speech-ai::after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -6px; top: 10px; width: 0; height: 0; border-top: 5px solid transparent; border-bottom: 5px solid transparent; border-right: 6px solid oklch(0.91 0.008 85 / 0.5); }

components.name: Speech Bubble (User)
components.description: User message bubble with right-pointing triangle. Primary tint background.
components.css: .ds-speech-user { position: relative; background: oklch(0.78 0.14 85 / 0.1); border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; } .ds-speech-user::after { content: ''; position: absolute; right: -6px; top: 10px; width: 0; height: 0; border-top: 5px solid transparent; border-bottom: 5px solid transparent; border-left: 6px solid oklch(0.78 0.14 85 / 0.1); }

components.name: Stage Pipeline
components.description: TopBar stage indicator: compact dot + icon + label for plan/render/compose.
components.css: .ds-stage-pipeline { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; font-family: 'Fredoka', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-stage-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; color: oklch(0.28 0.01 280 / 0.5); } .ds-stage-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(0.28 0.01 280 / 0.3); } .ds-stage-active .ds-stage-dot { background: #E8B730; } .ds-stage-active { color: #2C2C3A; }

narrative.overview:
A comic artist's workbench: professional, energetic, and immediately recognizable as a craft space, not a corporate tool. The surface is warm cream paper under ink. CMYK offset shadows and halftone dot textures are structural references to the printing process that gives comics their visual identity. Every design choice answers "does this feel like the workshop where comics get made?"

The system speaks two fluencies simultaneously: comic-book visual language (Bangers display type, CMYK shadows, halftone backgrounds, speech-bubble chat) and tool-clarity interaction (predictable grid layouts, consistent component vocabulary, 200ms state transitions). Comic energy without comic chaos. The workbench has inks, ruling pens, and registration marks, but the artist reaches for the right tool without thinking.

This system explicitly rejects three aesthetics: the grey SaaS panel (Notion/Jira coldness), the generic AI generator (white card grids + purple gradients), and the childlike doodle (over-rounded corners, candy colors, infantile typography).
keyCharacteristics: CMYK offset shadows as structural elevation, not decoration
Halftone dot textures as surface identity markers
Speech-bubble chat pattern grounded in comic convention
Tactile button press (translate on active, shadow collapse) with physical feedback
Dual-theme: warm cream workshop (light) / pressroom darkroom (dark)

rules.name: The CMYK Registration Rule
rules.body: The three accent colors (Inkwell Gold, Press Magenta, Ink Cyan) are the Cyan, Magenta, and Yellow plates. They are always used in their printing-register role: Gold for primary action, Magenta for emphasis, Cyan for structural accent. No plate swaps.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: Every neutral is tinted toward the yellow axis (hue ~85 in OKLCH). Pure grey or blue-grey neutrals are prohibited.

rules.name: The One Display Rule
rules.body: Bangers appears at most once per screen. If a second element needs display weight, use Fredoka 700 at headline size.

rules.name: The Mono-For-Data Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono is reserved for status labels, timestamps, technical identifiers, and code. Never use it for button labels, headings, or body text.

rules.name: The Offset-Is-Structure Rule
rules.body: CMYK shadows are structural elevation, not decorative drop shadows. Removing a shadow changes the element's hierarchy, not just its decoration.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Elements are flat at rest. Hover lifts (-0.5px translate) and expands shadow. Active presses (+1px translate) and collapses shadow. This physical model is the tactile foundation.

dos: Do use CMYK offset shadows to communicate visual hierarchy.
Do translate elements on hover/active for tactile press feedback.
Do tint all neutrals warm (toward the yellow axis).
Do use halftone dot backgrounds as surface identity markers.
Do keep Bangers display font to one appearance per screen.
Do use speech-bubble directional arrows to distinguish AI vs. user messages.
Do increase shadow and halftone opacity in dark mode (2-2.5x).
Do use JetBrains Mono only for status labels, timestamps, and technical identifiers.
donts: Don't use pure #000 or #fff for any element. Every neutral must be tinted.
Don't create grey SaaS panels. If it looks like Jira, it needs warmth.
Don't use generic AI tool aesthetics: white card grids with purple gradients.
Don't apply childlike doodle aesthetics: over-rounded corners, candy colors, infantile typography.
Don't use border-left/right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient).
Don't use glassmorphism as default surface treatment.
Don't decorate with CMYK shadows. Structural shadows stay; decorative shadows go.
Don't use display fonts (Bangers) in UI labels, buttons, or data.
Don't reinvent standard affordances (custom scrollbars, weird form controls).
